zh.Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾斯托爾斯特
海地崔拉斯卡巴斯貝利阿艾威爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Heppall於從1309年1月9日到1310年1月8日出生在英國藍卡爾蘭卡斯特時，她的父親Robert Heppall27歲，母親Cecily Chartney22歲。她和Sir John Sherburne至少有2個兒子。她去世於1391年8月4日在英國藍卡爾斯托爾斯特，埋葬在海地崔拉斯卡巴斯貝利阿艾威爾。

海地崔拉斯卡巴斯貝利阿艾威爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Heppall于从1309年1月9日到1310年1月8日出生在英国藍卡爾蘭卡斯特时，她的父亲Robert Heppall27岁，母亲Cecily Chartney22岁。她和Sir John Sherburne至少有2个儿子。她去世于1391年8月4日在英国藍卡爾斯托爾斯特，埋葬在海地崔拉斯卡巴斯貝利阿艾威爾。

nameMeanings.name: Heppall

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Heppall was born from 9 January 1309 to 8 January 1310, in Lancaster, Lancashire, England, her father, Robert Heppall, was 27 and her mother, Cecily Chartney, was 22. She had at least 2 sons with Sir John Sherburne. She died on 4 August 1391, in Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England, and was buried in Will, Belladère, Lascahobas, Centre, Haiti.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Heppall est née du 9 janvier 1309 au 8 janvier 1310, à Lancaster, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Heppall, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Cecily Chartney, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Sir John Sherburne. Elle est décédée le 4 août 1391, à Stonyhurst, Lancashire, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Will, Belladère, Lascahobas, Centre, Haïti.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Heppall von 9. Januar 1309 bis 8. Januar 1310 in Lancaster, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Heppall 27 und ihre Mutter Cecily Chartney 22. Sie hatte mit Sir John Sherburne mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 4. August 1391 in Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England und wurde in Will, Belladère, Lascahobas, Centre, Haiti begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Heppall è nata il da 9 gennaio 1309 a 8 gennaio 1310 nel Lancaster, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Robert Heppall, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Cecily Chartney, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Sir John Sherburne. Morì il 4 agosto 1391, nel Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England, e fu sepolta a Will, Belladère, Lascahobas, Centre, Haiti.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Heppallがから1309年1月9日まで1310年1月8日にイギリスランカシュアイアランカスターで生まれた時，父Robert Heppallは27歳，母Cecily Chartneyは22歳であった。彼女はSir John Sherburneとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1391年8月4日にイギリスランカシュアイアストニーハルストで死去し，ハイチセントアラスカホバスベラドeアウィルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Heppall(이)가 1309년 1월 9일부터 1310년 1월 8일까지 영국 랭카실르 랭커스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Heppall(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecily Chartney(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Sir John Sherburne(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1391년 8월 4일 영국 랭카실르 스토니후르스트에서 사망했으며 아이티 세트르 래스카홉아스 벨라드e르 윌에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Heppall nasceu de 9 de janeiro de 1309 a 8 de janeiro de 1310, em Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Heppall, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Cecily Chartney, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Sir John Sherburne. Ela faleceu em 4 de agosto de 1391, em Stonyhurst, Lancashire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Will, Belladère, Lascahobas, Centre, Haiti.

ru.1309–4 August 1391: с 9 января 1309 по 8 января 1310–4 августа 1391 г.
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Heppall родилась с 9 января 1309 по 8 января 1310 в местности ланкастир, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Heppall было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily Chartney, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Sir John Sherburne. Она умерла 4 августа 1391 г. в местности стонихурст, ланкашир, Англия и была похоронена в местности уилл, белладeр, ласкахобас, кентр, Гаити.
